## About I'm a natural tear-every-gadget-down guy, born 0.24×Centuries ago. Tech-minded, I cannot help wondering how everything works around me, from the most massive, mind-bending System to the tiniest nano-device. Yet even so, I love to gulp books down and lose myself into music. [via]. Meticulous attention to detail. Speech Skills.
Trustworthy and Language-Lively, always willing to learn.
Pattern-spotter. Outgineer. Don't forget to click Like :)
